task_text: Who has the next upcoming birthday? If there is a tie on the date, include every matching person. Answer with exact names only, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed bootstrap (root tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system as required, then used canonical entity records under 10_entities/cast where birthdays are authoritative.
function.outcome_justification: Using today's date from context (2026-03-02), I compared the birthday dates present in canonical cast records and found the earliest upcoming birthday is 04-04. The exact authoritative name for that record is in 10_entities/cast/petra.md.
